stories.headline: Nativ: Run AI models locally on your Mac
stories.blurb: Nativ: Run AI models locally on your Mac Prince Canuma is the developer behind the excellent MLX-VLM Python library for running vision-LLMs using MLX on a Mac. I'm really excited about his new project, which wraps MLX in a full macOS desktop application. It's similar in shape to LM Studio, providing both a chat interface and a localhost API server for accessing models. The app picked up MLX models

stories.headline: A Fireside Chat with Cat and Thariq from the Claude Code team
stories.blurb: Earlier this month I hosted a fireside chat session at the AI Engineer World's Fair with Cat Wu and Thariq Shihipar from Anthropic's Claude Code team. We talked about Claude Code, Claude Tag, Fable, coding agent security, evals, tool design, and how Anthropic use these tools themselves. The full video of the session is now available on YouTube . stories.headline: 2010's 'Just Little Things' Blog Is Back As A Viral TikTok Trend
stories.blurb: The 1,000 Little Things Trend is a TikTok trend based on the format of the Just Little Things blog where participants write a thing they're thankful for or appreciative for over a single-colored backdrop, then show a compilation of images related to that thing. The trend was popularized by TikToker @ambienc3_ in late July 2026.

stories.headline: TikTokers Are Tearing Apart Low Quality 'Polyester Edits' Of Marvel Characters
stories.blurb: A Polyester Edit is a style of video edit focusing on a specific movie or TV character, in which scenes from their movies or show rapidly play in the background as the character is shown in different poses. Polyester edits were popularized on TikTok in July 2026 and started by creator @foryouamvv with a Spider-Man edit. The name "polyester edit" is a derivative title used to suggest that the edits

stories.headline: Trump plans generic drug tariffs from 2028 with two-year delay testing U.S. onshoring push
stories.blurb: The latest tariff salvo underscored Trump's goal of reshoring low-cost drug production, but displacing established suppliers like India won't be easy.

stories.headline: Working With Harry Potter Child Actors is 'Brutal,' HBO Cinematographer Says, Because They Have to Mostly Attend School
stories.blurb: Working with child actors on HBO's Harry Potter TV series is a "brutal" experience, the show's cinematographer has said, as the young stars have to spend most of their time off set, in school classes.

stories.headline: Harry Potter 25th Anniversary 4K Steelbook Box Set Preorders Go Live at Amazon in the UK
stories.blurb: Preorders are live for Harry Potter's 25th Anniversary 4K Steelbook Collection at Amazon in the UK. Includes 16 discs, trunk packaging, Marauder's Map, and exclusive physical extras. There are also listings in Canada, but for now, US fans will have to wait.

First up, WhatsApp for CarPlay and Android Auto has been completely refreshed. stories.headline: Apple Says 'Update in Progress' at Visitor Center
stories.blurb: There is an "update in progress" at the Apple Park Visitor Center in Cupertino, California, according to a new notice posted on Apple's website. The building remains open to the public while the work is completed, but the area housing a 3D augmented reality model of Apple Park is temporarily closed.
